Title: Afghan court convicts US trio of torture - Analysis
Description: KABUL, Afghanistan -- Three Americans -- led by a former Green Beret who boasted he had Pentagon support -- were found guilty yesterday of torturing Afghans in a private jail and were sentenced to prison. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: Multiplex, Westfield in UK bid - Analysis
Description: SHOPPING centre giant Westfield Group has drafted rival Multiplex and the billionaire Reuben brothers into its pound stg. 585 million (\$1. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: Romania Faces Hung Parliament Risk After Vote - Analysis
Description: BUCHAREST (Reuters) - Romania faced weeks of uncertainty on  Monday after inconclusive general elections in the poor Balkan  country, already struggling to stay on track to join the  European Union.  Partial results showed the ruling ex-communist Social Democrats  (PSD) of Prime Minister Adrian Nastase a whisker ahead of the  opposition centrists in Sunday's election but well short of a  majority in parliament. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: Update 1: Toshiba, TCL to Cooperate on Appliances - Analysis
Description: Focusing on the fast-growing Chinese market, Japan #39;s Toshiba and major Chinese appliance maker TCL have signed a broad agreement to cooperate in making and marketing appliances in China, the companies said Thursday. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: Baby for ovary transplant woman - Analysis
Description: A Belgian cancer patient made infertile by chemotherapy has given birth following revolutionary treatment. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: Israeli tank reportedly kills Egyptian troops - Analysis
Description: An Israeli tank has opened fire and killed three Egyptian troops on the sensitive border between the two countries, mistaking them for Palestinian militants on the way to carry out an attack, Israeli media says. This report summarizes recent developments and background context.

Title: U.S. Says New Images Show Iran Plans Nuclear Bomb - Analysis
Description: VIENNA (Reuters) - A senior U.S. official said on Thursday  that satellite photographs of a suspected nuclear industrial  site in Iran demonstrated its intention to develop atomic  weapons, an allegation Tehran dismissed as "a new lie." This report summarizes recent developments and background context.
